rules.rule_text:
rule TrojanWin32NedsymGSample
{
	meta:
		Description = "Trojan.Nedsym.sm"
		ThreatLevel = "5"

	strings:
		$ = "qwertyuiopasdfghjklzxcvbnm123456789" ascii wide
		$ = "svcnost.exe" ascii wide
		$ = "Windows Init" ascii wide
		$ = "\\drivers\\etc\\hosts" ascii wide

	condition:
		2 of them
}
